economic_notes: Investments in limited partnerships: MRDP (wind energy - Beaubassin Mi'kmaq Wind LP and Whynott's Mi'kmaq Wind LP) and E'sukutimkewey Limited Partnership (surf clam industry). Distribution received from ELP of $170,766 during the year. Gas bar, tobacco shop, gift shop, and restaurant operations on reserve.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Province is Nova Scotia. Four consolidated entities: Wagmatcook First Nation Operating and Capital Funds, Trust Funds, Wagmatcook Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex, and Wagmatcook Education Authority Limited. Two limited partnerships accounted for on modified equity basis (not consolidated): MRDP and ELP. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue $35,751,777 minus total government transfers $17,479,649 = $18,272,128, which includes economic activities revenue. Annual debt service reflects principal payments on long-term debt only; operating loan principal payments of $67,693 additional. Intangible assets of $14,395,680 (fishing licenses) included in non-financial assets. Large CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative deferred revenue of $2,941,333 carried at year end.
